q: They __________ soccer after school every day.
They __________ soccer after school yesterday.
Tom __________ TV every night.
Tom __________ TV last night.
I __________ English every day.
I __________ English yesterday.
She __________ her room every weekend.
She __________ her room last weekend.
We __________ to school by bus every day.
We __________ to school by bus yesterday.
He __________ hard at school every day.
He __________ hard at school last week.
They __________ dinner at six every day.
They __________ dinner at six yesterday.
Jane __________ tennis with her friend every Saturday.
Jane __________ tennis with her friend last Saturday.
I __________ milk every morning.
I __________ milk this morning.
He __________ his homework after dinner every day.
He __________ his homework after dinner last night.
